Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_parsed.reasoning_summary: My opinions on managing and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines are shaped by my anxious personality trait and my background living in Bologna, Italy. As an unemployed individual, I have had to rely on my creative outlets, such as photography and cooking, to cope with stressful situations. My parents, both of whom hold primary school educations, instilled in me the importance of seeking knowledge and understanding different perspectives.
